message:
Fix Checkers fullscreen taunt overlap and add behind-main warning (#4656)

- Move pirate taunt speech bubble below the board instead of overlaying
  it with absolute positioning, preventing AI dialogues from covering
  pieces in fullscreen mode (#4653)
- Add subtle "Behind main" indicator in the sidebar footer when running
  in developer mode on an older commit than main HEAD (#4652)

Fixes #4652, #4653

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
